evidence.note: The formula-version string this wrapper cohorts on is a real, line-verified production constant.

notes: Declaration only. Evaluator works on caller-supplied in-memory rows; it reads no database, writes no database, and writes no files.

knownRisks: Founder performance evidence (strong 30D) is a screenshot/chat artifact, not a committed July 8 repo report -- no July-8-dated model report exists in this repo.
Fresh 7D/14D verification is still required before promotion beyond read-only comparison.
This strategy is a formula-version cohort wrapper (select rows whose formula version equals trusted-initial-formula-v1.1), NOT a reimplementation of the internal formula algorithm.
promotionBlockedReasons: No live promotion without a DQA-clean read-only comparison over 7D/14D/30D.
No live promotion without explicit founder approval.
